series.curator_notes: Primarily Kinderlieder (children's songs) rather than narrative Hörspiele — includes themed compilations (sleep songs, Christmas songs, seasons). Note the 'Neues aus der Milchzahnstrasse / Bahnhof Bauch' entries which are the artist's popular storytelling format; Detlev Jöcker is also known for Singemaus character albums and the 'Bahnhof Bauch' universe.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
